name: qwergpt
documentation:
# QwerGPT

A Lightweight Framework for building LLM applications.

### Roadmap

* Observability
* Prompt Versioning
* Easily Evaluating

### Quick Start

```
cp .env.example .env
```

documentation:
Initialize FaissVectorStore

Args:

    dimension: Vector dimension, defaults to 768

    limit: Number of results to return
    
Returns:

Initialize MilvusVectorStore

Args:

    collection_name: Name of the collection
    embedder: Embedder instance to generate vectors
    dimension: Vector dimension, defaults to 768

classes.name: qwergpt.embedders.ollama.OllamaEmbedder

methods.name: qwergpt.embedders.ollama.OllamaEmbedder.__init__
documentation:
Initialize Ollama embedder

Args:
    base_url: Ollama API base URL
    model: Model name to use for embeddings

methods.name: qwergpt.embedders.ollama.OllamaEmbedder.embed
documentation:
Get embedding for text using Ollama API

Args:
    text: Input text or list of texts to embed
    
Returns:
    numpy array of embedding vectors. If input is a single string,
    returns a 1D array. If input is a list, returns a 2D array.
    
Raises:
    RuntimeError: If API call fails

methods.name: qwergpt.embedders.ollama.OllamaEmbedder._get_single_embedding
documentation:
Helper method to get embedding for a single text

Args:
    text: Input text to embed
    
Returns:
    numpy array of embedding vector
Embedder implementation using Ollama API
